title: Tri Power Bracelet — Set of 3 Crystal Bracelets
short_description: A coordinated set of three stretch crystal bracelets — bold Red Jasper, calming Howlite and grounding Black Obsidian — for strength, calmness and protection in one wearable trio.
body_html:
Bring strength, calmness and protection into one powerful combination with the Tri Power Bracelet. This coordinated set includes three crystal bracelets designed with bold Red Jasper, calming white Howlite and glossy Black Obsidian beads, finished with polished metallic spacers.

Each bracelet carries a different arrangement of the three crystals — one with a balanced colour pattern, one with an evenly mixed design and one with a bold Red Jasper base and a detailed centre accent. Together they create a versatile trio you can wear as a complete stack or style separately according to your mood and intention.

The meaning behind the trio

  • Red Jasper — traditionally associated with stability, courage and inner strength; an everyday anchor for staying steady and centred.
  • Howlite — connected with patience, relaxation and a balanced mindset during busy moments.
  • Black Obsidian — associated with grounding and protection from draining or negative surroundings.

Why you'll love it

  • Three bracelets in one set — coordinated designs for multiple styling options.
  • Triple crystal combination — Red Jasper, Howlite and Black Obsidian in a balanced, meaningful design.
  • Power-inspired symbolism — strength, a steady mindset and protection from distraction.
  • Distinct individual designs — each bracelet stands complete on its own, yet complements the other two when stacked.
  • Flexible slip-on construction — the stretch-style cord slides on and off easily, no clasp needed.
  • Bold unisex styling — the red, white, black and gold palette pairs effortlessly with different personal styles.

Crystal properties are based on traditional beliefs and are not intended as medical claims or guaranteed outcomes.
seo_title: Tri Power Bracelet — Set of 3 Crystal Bracelets
seo_description: Set of 3 stretch crystal bracelets — Red Jasper, Howlite & Black Obsidian for strength, calm & protection. Unisex, slip-on, gift-ready. Studd Muffyn.

metafields.highlights: Set of 3 coordinated crystal bracelets · Red Jasper, Howlite & Black Obsidian beads · Strength, calmness & protection combination · Gold-tone metallic spacer detailing · Flexible stretch-style construction · Wear together or separately · Bold unisex styling · Everyday wear & gifting
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Red Jasper beads, Howlite beads, Black Obsidian beads, gold-toned and dark metallic spacer accents, elastic stretch cord.
metafields.care_or_directions: Slip on gently over the hand; avoid over-stretching the cord. Keep away from perfume, water and harsh chemicals to protect the polish. Wipe with a soft dry cloth and store flat in a pouch when not in use.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: What crystals are in the Tri Power Bracelet set?
faqs.a: The set pairs three natural-look crystal beads — Red Jasper for strength, Howlite for calm and Black Obsidian for grounding and protection — accented with gold-tone metallic spacers.

faqs.q: How many bracelets do I get?
faqs.a: You receive all three bracelets as one coordinated set. Each has its own arrangement, so you can stack all three or style them separately.
Yes — each bracelet uses a flexible stretch cord that slips on and off easily and comfortably fits most wrist sizes, no clasp required.

faqs.q: Is it suitable for both men and women?
faqs.a: Absolutely. The red, white, black and gold palette gives it a bold unisex look that works for everyday styling.

faqs.q: Do the crystals have real healing powers?
faqs.a: The meanings are based on long-standing traditional beliefs and are shared for symbolism and intention only — not as medical claims or guaranteed outcomes.

faqs.q: Does it make a good gift?
faqs.a: It does — the meaningful trio suits birthdays, career milestones, new beginnings, festive occasions and personal motivation gifting.

page_blocks.subtitle: Strength | Calmness | Protection
page_blocks.product_brief: The Tri Power Bracelet is a coordinated set of three stretch crystal bracelets — bold Red Jasper, calming Howlite and glossy Black Obsidian, finished with gold-tone metallic spacers. Wear all three as a complete power stack or style them separately by mood and intention. Slip-on comfort, bold unisex character and a meaning that stays with you all day.
page_blocks.what_we_put_in:
✦ Red Jasper Beads – rich red tones that bring warmth and boldness, traditionally linked to grounding, courage and inner strength
✦ Howlite Beads – white beads with subtle grey marbling, connected with patience, relaxation and a balanced mindset
✦ Black Obsidian Beads – glossy black beads that add depth and contrast, associated with protection and grounding
✦ Metallic Spacer Accents – gold-toned and dark spacers that separate the beads for a polished, premium finish
✦ Textured Centre Accent – one bracelet features a textured dark centre bead framed with metallic detail for a stronger statement look
✦ Flexible Stretch Cord – elastic construction that slides comfortably over the hand without a clasp
page_blocks.product_benefits:
✨ Encourages Inner Strength
Red Jasper is traditionally associated with confidence, endurance and staying consistent.
✨ Supports a Calm Mindset
Howlite represents patience, relaxation and a more thoughtful response to stress.
✨ Promotes Grounding and Protection
Black Obsidian is worn as a symbolic shield from negativity and draining surroundings.
✨ Creates Balanced Energy
The three-crystal combination represents strength without aggression and calm without passivity.
✨ Offers Multiple Styling Options
Wear all three together, pick one by intention or create a two-bracelet stack.
✨ Adds a Bold Colour Statement
The red, white, black and gold tones lift everyday outfits without feeling heavy.
page_blocks.product_details:
Base Metal: Alloy spacer accents
Color: Red, White, Black & Gold
Finish: Polished metallic spacers
Stones: Red Jasper, Howlite, Black Obsidian
Construction: Elastic stretch cord
Fit: Slip-on, fits most wrists
detail_points: 🔴 Set of three coordinated crystal bracelets in one
⚪ Red Jasper, Howlite & Black Obsidian in a balanced trio
🤝 Flexible stretch cord slips on easily, no clasp
page_blocks.product_specification:
Product Name: Tri Power Bracelet — Set of 3 Crystal Bracelets
Design: Three coordinated crystal-bead stretch bracelets with metallic spacers
Material: Red Jasper, Howlite & Black Obsidian beads with alloy metallic spacers on elastic cord
Net Quantity: 3 bracelets (1 set)
Colour: Red, White, Black & Gold
Country of Origin: India
page_blocks.how_to_use:
1. Choose your intention — strength, calm, protection, or all three together.
2. Gently slip each bracelet over your hand; avoid over-stretching the cord.
3. Stack all three for a full power look or wear one at a time by mood.
4. Remove before bathing or sleeping and store in a soft pouch.
